name: prose-judge resolves a config-namespace rule body from the second manifest, not unknown
command:
printf '# Design

## Decision

Grant a wildcard admin policy.
' > d.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/prose-judge.sh" --rule g-iam-no-wildcard-action --root . >/dev/null 2>&1; rc=$?; [ "$rc" != "2" ] && echo resolved 1>&2
